title: Kirana Store
content:
Macro sector: Retail / Grocery
English: Kirana Store
Nepali: Kirana Pasal (किराना पसल)
Typical roles: shop owner, cashier, helper
Common transactions: daily grocery sales; credit tab (udharo); stock purchase from wholesaler; home delivery
How users speak: mero pasal ma din ko kati bikri hua; udharo hisab nikalna parcha; stock kharcha tracking garnu cha

example_user_phrases: mero pasal ma din ko kati bikri hua

title: Hardware Store
content:
Macro sector: Retail / Hardware
English: Hardware Store

Common transactions: cement/rod sales; paint sales; credit to contractors; bulk order billing; supplier payments
How users speak: contractor lai udharo deko hisab; cement ko stock kati cha; supplier ko payment baaki cha

content:
Macro sector: Retail / Mobile & Electronics

Common transactions: handset sales; accessory sales; mobile repair billing; IMEI tracking; EMI sales
How users speak: mobile becheko bill banau; repair charge kati lagcha; EMI ma mobile deko hisab
